is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

has_community_free_movement_right.name: has_community_free_movement_right
has_community_free_movement_right.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is not a Union citizen and does not enjoy the Community right of free movement.

meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: meets_entry_or_stay_conditions
meets_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is present on the territory without meeting the conditions for entry or stay.

is_subject_of_removal_procedure.name: is_subject_of_removal_procedure
is_subject_of_removal_procedure.description: The person is the subject of a removal procedure.

is_subject_of_international_protection_p.name: is_subject_of_international_protection_procedure
is_subject_of_international_protection_p.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

is_subject_of_responsible_member_state_p.name: is_subject_of_responsible_member_state_procedure
is_subject_of_responsible_member_state_p.description: The person is the subject of a procedure for determination of or transfer to the responsible Member State for examining the international protection application.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination has been performed for the person.

has_valid_travel_document.name: has_valid_travel_document
has_valid_travel_document.description: The person is in possession of a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_own_country.name: recognised_as_national_by_own_country
recognised_as_national_by_own_country.description: The person has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.name: falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_category
falls_within_laissez_passer_nationality_.description: The person falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The person qualifies as an identified alien under the statutory definition.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person has not submitted a residence application following illegal entry or during illegal stay, or has not made an international protection application within the statutory time limit.

used_false_information_or_documents.name: used_false_information_or_documents
used_false_information_or_documents.description: The person has used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_authorities.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with the authorities responsible for access, residence, settlement, and removal regulations.

declared_unwillingness_or_failed_to_comp.name: declared_unwillingness_or_failed_to_comply_with_measure
declared_unwillingness_or_failed_to_comp.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with, or has already failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal of entry, removal, entry ban, liberty-restricting, or equivalent measure.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

submitted_new_application_immediately_af.name: submitted_new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_immediately_af.description: The person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry, residence, terminating stay, or a refusal of entry or removal measure.

concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound state after submitting an international protection application.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person has submitted multiple international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_application
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned, the person concealed that they had previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound state.

declared_or_apparent_purpose_other_than_.name: declared_or_apparent_purpose_other_than_application
declared_or_apparent_purpose_other_than_.description: The person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an international protection or residence application.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

absconding_risk_criterion_met.name: absconding_risk_criterion_met
absconding_risk_criterion_met.description: At least one of the statutory objective criteria for risk of absconding is met for the person.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: There is a current and real risk of absconding for the person, established following individual examination and based on one or more objective statutory criteria.
